text.title: onboarding-flows Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for onboarding-flows as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Tooltip tour with 8+ stops shown in the first session.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Users dismiss the entire sequence after the third tooltip; critical guidance for later steps is never seen.

failure-mode.description: A/B testing onboarding without segmenting by user type.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Segment X gains and segment Y losses cancel out; the test appears flat even when one group benefits significantly.

failure-mode.description: Empty state with multiple "create / import / use template" calls to action of equal weight.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Users who face a choice with no hierarchy think instead of act. One primary action + two secondary fallbacks is the correct pattern.
